cards.back: A morphological operation is a mathematical operation that operates on the shape and structure of an image
Erosion is a morphological operation that removes small objects from an image, based on a structuring element
Dilation is a morphological operation that increases the size of objects in an image, based on a structuring element
A hit-or-miss transformation is a morphological operation that applies a structuring element to an image to detect specific features
Opening is a morphological operation that combines erosion and dilation to remove small objects from an image and to smooth out the image
